# Normis

> Compliance API for AI agents — real-time, rule-cited, auditable. One API call before every regulated action returns allowed or blocked, with the exact rule cited.

Normis is the compliance layer for AI agents in regulated environments. Instead of agents guessing, a single `normis.check()` call gates each regulated action and returns a decision with the exact rule citation, for an auditable trail.

## Pages
- [Home](https://normis.dev/): What Normis does, how the check API works.
- [Privacy Policy](https://normis.dev/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://normis.dev/terms.html)
